title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review March 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price fell by 19.33% month-over-month (MoM) in March.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined by 48.60% MoM in March.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • BC LCFS monthly trading almost tripled MoM.
  • In February, BC LCFS saw a fall in credit prices by 26.86% MoM.
Oregon CFP:
  • In February, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 13.49% compared to January.
  • OR CFP trading activity in February fell as 262.93k credits were transferred.
Canada CFR:
  • The average offer price in CC3 remained stable at CAD 100.00 in March.
  • The average bid prices for CC2 rose by 10.13% and the average offer prices in CC2 rose by 0.23% MoM.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 3.23% MoM.
  • For February, 170.01K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $3.77M.
Â United States RFS:
  • RIN generation decreased by 17.26% in February.
  • A total of 3.69B RINs were transacted in February, 33.81% less than January.
author: Mansift Kaur
